entry.title: Re: Is it possible to enable Single-Sign On ( SSO ) to lo...
entry.content:
Hey, I have a follow-up question.
Is it possible to manage a user's permissions in the admin console from the Corperate IDP (in our case Microsoft). For example by defining certain attributes?
Or can permissions only be set through the admin console -> administration tab?
Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: JBOSS 8 Compability
entry.content:
There is currently no such thing as JBoss 10.

JBoss 8 is the latest and current version.

I think the documentation is confused and is actually referring to Wildfly 10 - A very old version of wildfly. (Wildfly is sort of the FOSS version of JBOSS )

Currently we are using JBoss 7.4 and that maps to Wildfly 23

We are about to move to JBoss 8.0 and that maps to Wildfly 28

The latest version of Wildfly is 35

entry.title: Re: Manage your hierarchies in FIORI 1/3
entry.content:
Hello Marcus,

 

we are using mostly

0COSTELMNT_0102_HIER, 0COSTCENTER_0101_HIER, 0PROFIT_CTR_0106_HIER, 0GL_ACCOUNT_T011_HIER and 0GLACCEXT_T011_HIER.

Just make sure to replicate the corresponding hierarchies into the HRRP-tables. 

 

Regards,

Kamil

entry.title: Re: Change of position name doesn't update in IT0001
entry.content: Check this:

entry.title: Re: Change of position name doesn't update in IT0001
entry.content:
Check this: SAP Notes: 3098249

 

BR

entry.title: Re: First steps to work with SAP Cloud ALM Deployment scenario for SAP ABAP systems (7.40 or higher)
entry.content:
Hi Dolores,

I was not sure that I could modify manually import buffer order because in the official documentation these 2 recommendation are reported: 

- We recommend avoiding manual import activities in CTS with transports managed by SAP Cloud ALM.

- Do not perform buffer manipulations in CTS with transports managed by SAP Cloud ALM. There is no self-healing mechanism available.

But if it is still possible as reported in your answer, if necessary I'll try to change the buffer order manually.

Regards

 Maurizio

entry.title: Re: Freight Cost Allocation and Service Entry Sheet not generated while posting the Freight Accrual.
entry.content:
Hi Vijay,
it should usually not happen, that only parts of the document chain is created during accruals posting. If an error occurs during posting, the freight document should be displayed in the Errors section of the Monitor Accrual Posting app and an application log with error messages should be available. Can you please check if this is the case and provide more detailed information.
With best regards,
Thomas Rösch
SAP SE

entry.title: SAC - Data locks on this model prevented the changes from publishing (data action script, one user)
entry.content:
Hello experts.

I'm facing a very frustrating issue with a data action script transferring records from a model to another.

Only one user has the error message below : 

The results of the data action "abcde" could not be published on version "2025_B1". You can still try to do a partial publish manually. Data locks on this model prevented the changes from publishing.

While for several other users the script runs fine.

(of course parameters are the same in each run)

Data locks are obviously managed the correct way (if not the case all runs would fail except for the admin user).

My user (with the planning professional licence) has of course no issue.

What could be different for user XXXX ? What would explain this difference of results ?

(I am considering opening a support ticket).

Any relevant investigation tricks would be welcome.

Thanks in advance & Regards.

G.

entry.title: Re: Manage your hierarchies in FIORI 3/3
entry.content:
Hi Rajesh

thanks for this very enlightening blog. I have created a new country hierarchy in the way you have discribed it above. Finaly I have activated the country hierarchy in Manage Global Hiearchies App. 

Now we have the issue that the created country hierarchie does not appear in Manage Allocation App as receivers parameter.  

Do you have a recommendation, what to do next? 

Thanks and regars

Sebastian B.

entry.title: Re: can we set up workflow when an order/ quote goes on c...
entry.content:
Hi @Ganeshmasne,

You can set up workflows for sales documents, but these are relevant for specific fields as sales organization, sales order type and net value: Approval Workflows for Sales Documents

However, if SAP Credit Management is active, you need to follow the standard process to release the document: Manage Documented Credit Decisions

I would recommend exploring the available features of SAP Credit Management.

Hope this helps.

Arturo

entry.title: Re: I need to make crystal report group by category verti...
entry.content:
Hello,

Put a group on category. Show your category in group header.
And show activity in detail's section.

You can underlay the header or show category on details.

You always have 3 activity by category ?
It's for excel's export ? 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: error detected by export dll
entry.content:
You stated that "If I remove any of these expressions then it doesn't fail.".
Did you mean to say If I remove all of these expressions then it doesn't fail?

Can you replicate the problem with a simple report using the Xtreme sample database?
If so, please upload that rpt file.  Add a .txt extension to allow the upload.

entry.title: Determination of the newest = latest record for non-effective dated objects
entry.content:
Abstract

There is often the request to fetch the latest record from non-effective dated records, as e.g. the highest educational qualification, the latest previous employer or the last performance rating given to an employee. There is no standard functionality to derive such details in one shot but there is a workaround which is presented in this blogpost in detail.

Introduction

As long as an object is effective dated, it is trivial to derive in a report the currently valid record, e.g. the current job title from job information or the marital status of an employee from personal information. However, there are many data which are stored in non-effective dated tables and objects. Examples are:

  • Annual performance ratings based on performance and objective evaluations (typically, valid from 1 January until 31 December of the respective year)
  • Education data with the school/university, a start date and end date together with the respective qualification (e.g. bachelor, master or doctoral degree)
  • Data about the previous employments with the employer name, start date and end date of the previous employment, together with the activities and tasks in the respective previous companies

In many reporting use cases, however, it is required to derive just the latest (=newest) record and not all data records. Figure 1 shows as an example the calculated overall performance ranking of “Andree Durant” (in that system, the 2017-record is the latest = newest record).

Figure 1 – Talent profile data of sample employee Andree Durant

Figure 2 shows the simple report output, which is based on a query that uses “Basic User Information” and the performance forms. You see that the complete history is shown, i.e. 6 records for the years 2012 until 2017 with the respective “Calculated Overall Performance Ratings”. The reporting challenge is deriving just the latest performance rating, i.e. 2,89 valid for 2017; so that the report shows just a single row for employee “Andree Durant”. This blogpost describes the process how to achieve that. Of course, the approach can also be used for other cases (e.g. those mentioned in the introduction above or any other).

Figure 2 – Report output of a simple query based on “Basic User Information” and the performance forms

Solution

In the following the required steps are described to get just the latest record instead of the full history.

Creation of the query, e.g. “Basic User Information” -> “Form” -> “Performance”. Select the fields which are relevant in your case, such as e.g. username, user ID, employees name, form start date / form end date and the “Calculated Overall Performance Rating”.
Now create following calculated columns:

  1. Calculated column “DAYSBETWEENENDDATEANDTODAY - Days Between End Date and Today” as shown in the upper part of Figure 3.
    Important: Use “MIN” as ‘Aggregation Type” for this newly created calculated column (as indicated in the lower part of Figure 3).
  2. In addition, create a second calculated column “DUMMY - dummy” as indicated in the middle part of Figure 3 (an explanation why “DUMMY - dummy” is needed and how it is used follows below).

Figure 3 – Definition of the two query calculated columns

Create a calculated measure of type “Restriction” called “Minimum Days (Constant Selection)” as indicated in Figure 4. In particular take case on the following:

  1. It is important to declare the measure as a “constant” (see red arrow in Figure 4).
  2. Unfortunately the declaration of a measure as “constant” is only possible for a “Restricted Measure”. That means it is required to add a filter criteria. Here, it is recommended to use a (dummy) condition which is always fulfilled. Exactly here, it’s recommended to use the calculated column “dummy” mentioned above, i.e. to use a filter on "dummy = "a" (see blue box in Figure 4).
  3. Use all fields used in the “Cross-tab” except the “User ID” and “Username” as “Constant Dimension” (see yellow box in Figure 4).

Figure 4 – Definition of calculated measure “Minimum Days (Constant Selection)”

As you can see in Figure 5, “Minimum Days (Constant Selection)” shows constantly the smallest value of the Day Difference for all records of the respective user.

Figure 5 – Report output with the previously created measures

As a final step, it is required to filter the records for the latest record, i.e. “latest” = record where “Days Between End Date and Today” is equal to “Minimum Days (Constant Selection)”. To achieve this, the following 3 steps are required:

  • Creation of the “Calculated Measure” called “Filter (Days = Min Days)”, see Figure 6
  • Conversion of the measure “Filter (Days = Min Days)” into a dimension “Filter as Dimension” as indicated in Figure 7: This step is needed since it is not possible to apply a filter in a “cross-tab” for a measure but only for a dimension.
  • Apply a filter to the “cross-tab” in the following way: “Filter as Dimension” Equals “1”

Figure 6 - Definition of calculated measure “Filter (Days = Min Days)”

Figure 7 - Definition of Measure-Based Dimension “Filter as Dimension”

 

Compare the outcome of the table as shows in Figure 8 with the expected outcome as indicated in Figure 2. You will realize that the outcome looks as expected.

Figure 8 – Report output after the filter “Filter as Dimension” = “1” is applied

As described in the beginning, of course, the same approach can also be applied for all other use cases when it’s needed to derive the latest record from non-effective dated records, e.g. to derive the highest educational qualification (in that case the query can be based on “Basic User Information” -> “Formal Education”) or to derive the previous employer (in that case the query might be based on “Basic User Information” -> “Previous Employment”).

Remark: This blog post was created with the support of Bastian Posch, Senior Service Advisor - Germany, HCM Cloud Services

entry.title: Re: How add custom field on XML/PDF on a eDocument for Ch...
The Metadata behind SAP Data Products in SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content:
On February 13th, 2025, we introduced SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) to help enterprises unlock value from their data, using it to power analytics, AI, and automation. Fundamental to BDC are Data Products: curated datasets that are accessible, self-describing, discoverable, and understandable . The value and usability of any data partly depends on the availability and quality of metadata, which is also true for the Data Products of BDC. This blog post provides a deep dive into the metadata for SAP Data Products.

In summary, SAP uses open metadata standards to describe Data Products. The API / data model of Data Products is described in Core Schema Notation Interoperability Specification (CSN Interop). The high-level information about Data Products, their taxonomy and relationships are described in Open Resource Discovery with a focus on taxonomy and connecting Data Products with development, integration, and business-oriented concepts.

 

High-Level Metadata

SAP developed a metadata discovery standard for describing and publishing various types of APIs and events: Open Resource Discovery (ORD). ORD is part of the Apeiro Reference Architecture and is contributed as open source to the European IPCEI-CIS initiative as a standard for interoperability. It was a natural step to leverage this existing standard rather than to create another isolated metadata standard that only covers the Data Product and platform aspects. So, we extended ORD to include the Data Product concept and connected it with other existing developer-focused concepts. 

This also helps with avoiding the typical problem of siloed and fragmented metadata graphs. We believe there is huge value in connecting the various metadata concepts that are relevant to developers, architects, data scientists, and business persona. Our strategy is to bring all these aspects together and aggregate the metadata into central repositories.

In our model, the Data Product is a grouping concept that carries the relevant metadata to describe the dataset and its data qualities. A Data Product itself is not directly consumable, but it exposes data through output ports, which can be implemented as APIs or events. In the first iteration of BDC, the primary Data Products expose a single output port as delta-sharing API. In principle, there can be multiple output ports of various API and/or event types. To understand data ingestion, lineage, and dependencies, Data Products can also have input ports which are the equivalent of an ORD Integration Dependency that lists the APIs and events that are used to ingest or process the data. Most of the concepts have relations to Entity Type, which represents business objects / domain objects / ODM entities as semantic taxonomy terms business experts would understand.

Right now, SAP uses the ORD protocol to streamline our own discovery and publishing processes, most notably to the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) System Landscape, SAP Build and to the BDC Cockpit.  This all happens behind the scenes, so customers are not exposed to it and can benefit from a better integrated experience. However, in our partnership with Databricks, we also use the ORD protocol to connect the Databricks Unity Catalog with the Data Products provided by BDC as well as the other way around, retrieving Data Products created in Databricks into BDC. Leveraging ORD as an open metadata standard is a very important part of our partnership. We are looking forward to growing the ecosystem around ORD in our partnerships.

For more information about Data Products in ORD, have a look at the ORD Data Product page.

 

Data Product API / Data Model

Data Products exposed by SAP applications will use the industry-standard Delta Sharing protocol, but customers will also be able to expose Data Products via other types of APIs. In Delta Sharing, the Delta Table metadata format provides the basics for wider ecosystem interoperability. For many of our use cases, we need even richer metadata – more semantics and a model that is closer to our existing metadata models.

Many SAP products already support the SAP-specific Core Data Services (CDS) metamodel, which may also be known to our customers as the metadata format for ABAP (RAP) and SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP). Since we invested in rich metadata in CDS models for many years (sometimes decades), it made sense to leverage it also for Data Products, preserving and transferring the rich metadata and semantics we often already have.

As CDS models can be exported in the CSN format in many variants and flavors, we created a public specification that focuses on an interoperable, machine-consumption-optimized format: Core Schema Notation Interoperability Specification (CSN Interop).

With CSN Interop, we describe the API / data model of the Data Products output port. The most relevant aspects are that we describe entities (tables / objects) and elements (fields, properties). By assigning entities to a service, we define (or imply) the protocol and mapping how they are exposed as an API with a concrete data serialization format.

Since the CSN format is not well known outside of the SAP ecosystem, here are some interesting aspects:

CSN is well suited to describe “conceptual” models, which are more abstract than, e.g., JSON Schema. The same CSN model can be exposed through different API protocols and data serialization formats (via assignment to a Service). It can also be used as a persistency model for the database. The core entity model in CSN is therefore agnostic of protocol and serialization format. The final API / data interface is then decided by the chosen mapping. In the case of the Delta Sharing APIs, we defined a mapping to the Apache Spark type system.

Also, CSN already has extensive annotation vocabularies, which can carry a lot of additional information like business semantics (@Semantics, @ODM), relationships, and metadata that improve the semantic onboarding experience. This means that there is no need to rebuild a rich, semantic metamodel from scratch, because we can carry over the information. 

For more information, have a look at the CSN Interop page and its Primer.

 

Future Direction

We plan to extend the current scope of the metadata standards and further improve the data product metadata with more annotations and better coverage. We want to establish ORD as a de facto industry standard, being an intrinsic piece of our open ecosystem approach similar as we use ORD as the solid foundation of our partnership with Databricks.

If you have questions, feedback or just want to get in touch with us, feel free to reach out!

entry.title: Vendor changed into the partner function of Purchase order
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have the following problem, inside the ‘partner functions’ tab of the Purchase Order there is a different supplier from the one in the header of the document, as you can see in the attached photo:

 

The PO has no reference document. In addition, I have checked the business partner's master data and there is no link to the other supplier:

Fortunately, I checked in the report ‘Display Purchasing Documents by Supplier’ and there are no POs with the wrong supplier.
Only in the CDS View of the PO partners the wrong supplier appears; whereas in the CDS View of the document header, the only correct supplier appears.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: SAM auto-sync parameters
entry.content: Threshold determines how frequently autosync can run. So if your threshold is 30 and you save an item it will check if you have synced in the last 30 minutes. If you have, it will not sync. This is to keep the app from hitting the server more frequently than it needs to since it's very easy to rapidly do multiple save actions.

entry.title: Re: Create/Restore Postgres DB Backup
entry.content: Hi, can you try to run the restore for a different instance ? What is the service plan that you are using and please provide also information about the region where you are trying to do the restore. Regards Antonio

entry.title: Re: OAOA - Change AUC status from Investment Measure to N...
entry.content: I have the same issue

entry.title: Two cost lines same tax code split tax line
entry.content:
Hi,

our company code in China has the following request:

Vendor posting with FB01

Line 01: 34 Vendor   10.000

Line 02: 40 Cost GL  8.490,56 Tax code J3 6%

Line 03: 40 GL Cost 943,40 Tax code J3 6%

Line 04: 40 VAT GL 6% 566,04

The requirement is, to split the line 04 based on the values in line 02 and 03 - so we want to have instead one line on the tax GL in this case two lines with the same GL and same tax code. It should be an 1:1 relationship between the cost line and the tax line, so means for each cost line with VAT 6% we want to generate a new tax line with 6% in the same FI-document.

 

Thanks!

entry.title: How to create a simple SAP GUI using SAP Process Automation.
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

I am creating my first bot with Sales Order Creation, Unable to create my first automation.

 

regards

Madevan

entry.title: Re: SAM auto-sync parameters
entry.content: thanks for the reply, this makes sense as the PERIODIC parameter is a # not a Y/N flag so it handles the period itself

entry.title: Custom Message Mapping - TPM - B2B - SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
In this Blog, I would like to share the effective way of using Message Mapping in B2B Scenarios using TPM and SAP Integration Suite.

Prerequisites:
Knowledge in SAP Integration Suite, Integration Advisor, TPM, Message Mapping, B2B Concepts.

Lets get Started:

TPM allows us to use a custom mapping instead of the standard MAG/XSLT mappings.

In case if you use the above approach, you have to create a Custom Integration Flow using Process Direct Sender with the address mentioned as above,

Normally what we tend to do is, create "N" number of Integration Flows because of either of the following reason,


1. You maintain different addresses in TPM for different agreements.

OR

2. You maintain the same address in TPM, but you have different message mapping for partners and EDI messages.

Here, What we will do is eliminate the number of Integration Flows created in this process, Instead we will try to achieve all B2B transformations through just one single Integration Flow.

To achieve this, Proceed as below:

Step 1:
Maintain a parameter in TPM agreement,

For each inbound/outbound agreement, provide an activity parameter.

Key: Put any Parameter Name of your choice but should be same for all B2B agreements. (Inbound/Outbound)

Value: Your Message Mapping ID value. (Reference shown below)

Step 2:
Create a package and create your Integration Flow.

Step 3:
Access the Custom Parameters of the Agreement using Groovy.

In this case:

Property Name <==> Activity Parameter Key
Property Value <==> Activity Parameter value (Refer Step 1)

Step 4:
Add "ref:" to Property Value

Step 5: 
Use this property in Message Mapping

Step 6:
Add Global reference to your Groovy and Message Mappings.

So next time, you onboard a new Customer / Vendor / 3PL, All you have to do is

A. Maintain agreements in TPM.

B. Create Message Mapping as per your need.

C. Add global reference of the message mapping into the Integration Flow (Created in Step 2).

PS: You can refer the Groovy scripts from Accelerator Hub,

Thanks for your time. 


Regards,

Kottiyil Ramnath

SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: Cumulativ Material Ledger initialization (MR22)
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Here is my problematic:
Our customer plans to use the material ledger in Year-to-Date Run Type at system startup:

The question we're asking ourselves today is this: How to initialize the Material Ledger value?

I mean, our customer has been calculating the actual production costs of his products for years and would like the Material Ledger to consider the last known value at start-up, before calculating the actual stock value (CKMLCP) at the 1st monthly closing in SAP. (the go-live takes place during the current fiscal year)

However, they does not wish to define this actual price as the standard price for their products.

If we had been using a S/4HANA On Premise system, we would have followed the following procedure:

Initialization scenario: (Go live on 01/03/2025)

  • Load material master data
  • Load stocks: Quantity and standard or MAP values at month-end (28/02/2025)
  • Validate inventory value, reconcile with balance sheet on inventory accounts (Business)
  • Run CK40N as of 01/03/2025 (new period) => Automatic generation of accounting entry for standard revaluation difference
  • 01/03: loading of actual price difference with transaction code MR22 on date 28/02/2025 to integrate current value
  • Run Material Ledger (CKMLCP) for period M-1 (February)

We are currently experiencing a problem with the step highlighted in red, which to our knowledge cannot be carried out in S/4HANA Public Cloud, as an application equivalent to the MR22 transaction code does not appear to exist.

The fioriappslibrary provides the Manage Material Valuations application for transaction code MR22. But this application doesn't seem to allow us to modify the stock value as the MR22 transaction did. (I mean debit/credit a material)
According to the online documentation for S/4HANA Public Cloud, this functionality should be available : https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/7f47a6d9441c46ac86c96fd27f6015f0/0152bfb67de346768835bd7ccba3c07c.html?locale=en-US&version=2502.500

Are we missing something in app F2680?

We did some tests with API_MATERIAL_VALUATION_SRV (https://api.sap.com/api/API_MATERIAL_VALUATION_SRV/path/post_InventoryPriceChange) but it just changed the material price like a MR21.

Thanks for your support.

Romain C.

entry.title: Re: Use of Program rfopenposting_fr in New GL for FEC filing
entry.content:
Can you still see the previous opening balance documents after switching to the new GL (use FB03 as these documents should not be displayed with FAGLL03 / FAGLB03) So you should only have to generate the opening balance of 2025?

If postings have already been created for the target fiscal year, the system should issue a warning or error message (since 2021?)

entry.title: EDI_DOCUMENT_STATUS_SET requires EDI_DS which is forbidden in cloud
entry.content:
Hi.

I am trying to call EDI_DOCUMENT_STATUS_SET from BTP, so I defined the communication arrangement, communication services (for open, close and status_set) and now I hit a snag when writing the call.

In the coding above, ls_idoc_status should have type EDI_DS. If I try to define the variable, I get an error that EDI_DS is not allowed.

The POC coding I am working from used a Z version of EDI_DS, which basically copied everything over in the code, but.... really? Ok, for a POC this is ok, but surely for real production coding there must be a better solution than this. Even redefining it as an own DDIC object is... inelegant, I think.

What could I do here?

entry.title: Re: How to schedule job for open & close posting period w...
entry.content: Have you tried a dynamic date calculation using the different factory calendars?

entry.title: Re: Does the CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE API (e-mail via RAP) all...
entry.content:
We found the solution. Configuration of the System Email Outbound | SAP Help Portal

Activate BC-Set BCS_ADDRESS_CHECK_BADI_ACTIVE via transaction SCPR20 and then configure the e-mail address check in SPRO -> ABAP Platform -> Application Server -> E-Mail Configuration -> ...

Remark: These settings are client-specific and are not recorded on transport requests. 

@ SAP: Would be nice to enhance the new framework's documentation and add documentation on api.sap.com!

entry.title: Devtoberfest Winners Revealed
entry.content:
After weeks of coding, debugging and surviving on learning and pure determination, the results are in our Devtoberfest winners have officially been crowned!  It unfortunately did take way longer this year for the legal validation to be completed. But we are happy that the results are now final. 

Let’s take a moment to appreciate all the incredible talent last year. We are blown away by the resilient, problem-solving skills and downright genius that came out of this competition.

Whether you learned to build a groundbreaking new app or how to design the sleekest UI ever seen, you’re all winners in our hearts.

So, without further ado, let's give a massive shoutout to our incredible winners:

  1. @mclb 
  2. @iliano 
  3. @lvhengel 
  4. @Kaca1 
  5. @mdixit 
  6. @MaheshChandra 
  7. @michaelteti 
  8. @GertMertens 
  9. @vishalakshmi 
  10. @Pedro_Pereira 

But Let’s get to the exciting part…

This year’s Devtoberfest champions will receive a similar epic prize as last year: an all expenses paid trip to the main SAP TechEd in person experience -- this year in Berlin, Germany!

That’s right – you’re heading to one of the most innovative and inspiring tech gatherings on the planet. 

SAP TechEd in Berlin and SAP TechEd Virtual

November 4–6, 2025
SAP Events

Why is TechEd such a big deal?

If you haven’t heard of TechEd, you’re in for a treat. Imagine a space buzzing with top-tier developers, industry leaders and tech giants sharing latest tools, trends and ideas. It is a goldmine of learning, networking and inspirations.

 

 

We are pretty far out from the event right now and many details have yet to be determined.  But the Devtoberfest winners can already start packing their bags as their seats at the event are reserved. We will have more exciting aspects for the Devtoberfest winners as we get closer to the TechEd event dates. 

A Huge Thanks to Everyone who participated

Before we wrap up, a massive thank you to all our participants. You poured your heart and code into this, and it showed. Every project submitted was a testament to the passion and skill in our community.

So, to our winners: pack your bags, brush up on your TechEd knowledge and get ready for an unforgettable experience. And to everyone else—don’t worry, there is always next year.

Here’s to another amazing Devtoberfest! Until next time, happy coding!

Flashback to TechEd!

We've added some amazing pictures of the last year's Devtoberfest winners at TechEd 2024. Check them out for a dose of inspiration.

entry.title: Re: Action Required: Apple Push Notification Service Serv...
entry.content: @sergiogj1998 I checked with our engineering on this. Mobile Service already includes the new root certificate used by Apple and there is no action required from your end.

entry.title: @Ayesha_Mulla, did you find a resolution? Hide Current vs Expected Rating in CDP when adding learnin
entry.content: Hide Current vs Expected Rating in CDP when adding learning by competencies

entry.title: Insert Issue in Groovy script within Json Loop
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to loop json payload and execute Hana sql query in order to insert record into Hana DB. 

Its inserting only one record and breaks the loop. If i change the Json attribute(subscriptionactiontype) by keeping execute query outside loop, then loop is getting executed as many lines as we have. No Issues at all. But if i keep execute query statement within a loop, loop is getting executed for only once . Pls suggest.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Bangalore, India)
entry.content: Interested

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 Getting Started with Machine Learning and the Vector Engine using SAP HANA (Bangalore, Indi
entry.content: Interested

entry.title: Spot Award-how to get Nominator and Award Recipient's Org Unit as Point-in-time of the Request date?
entry.content: We are getting ready to implement the Spot Award in May 2025. When I tested the employee employment Organizational data (Division and Department), once employees moved from one org to another, the Division and Department data in Nominator and Award Recipient also updated to the most recent. I want to use the Division and Department on the employee on the request date (point in time) is that possible to config in the system? The budget is correct, it comes out from the correct Division (Previous employment) but the employee was not seating in the previous division.

entry.title: Re: How to get Header value from Datastore
entry.content: Hi, I have the same problem with select operation but if I using Get operation I'm receiving this error "No identifier provided in header SapDataStoreId for GET operation" where is necessary inform this header parameter SapDataStoreId to get the header values from datastore? Thanks in advance Regards

entry.title: Re: error detected by export dll
entry.content: I want to say some of them, "expressions"

entry.title: Re: Streamline Data Migration from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA: Selective Data Transition with Time-Slice
entry.content: Great insights into the time slice feature and its impact on data migration efficiency. A valuable read for anyone planning a move to SAP S/4HANA.

entry.title: Re: API that can get Cost Center and Manager fields by querying with worker's email
entry.content: Thanks for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts.

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP Adjusted Transport Supply is not getting fulf...
entry.content:
Hi,

if the optimizer retains some inventory to fulfill later pseudo-hard constraints, there must be some cost benefit to do this. E.g. inventory targets or SDOS. You can try using numerical pre-optimization. In the pre-solve step such secondary costs aren't considered.

Best regards, Carsten

entry.title: Re: Change of bank key in banks and house bank
entry.content: Thanks for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts.

entry.title: Select query Issue on HANA Cloud Replicated table from S/4
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Requirement: Replicate the S/4 table into Hana Cloud and query the record from Iflow-Groovy script and modify the Json payload

(1) I did replicate on prem(S/4) table into Hana cloud.

(2) Query is working in SQL Console.

(3) I did small test via JDBC which is getting me a result what i need.

PostMan:

(4) When i implement the same query via Groovy script, its not working as expected.

(5) Groovy script:

(6) PostMan result:

Attribute value is not getting modified. Apparently query is not getting executed. Pls suggest.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest Winners Revealed
entry.content: Congratulations to the winner! 👏

entry.title: SAPHILA 2025
entry.content:
Transcend Beyond Boundaries

To transcend is to break through traditional limits and explore new frontiers.

SAPHILA is a premier, biennial conference by the African SAP User Group (AFSUG), in collaboration with SAP Southern Africa. Held at the iconic Sun City Resort & Convention Centre, SAPHILA 2025 is where the SAP user community gathers to connect, innovate, and grow.

Join a powerful network of leaders, from CIOs and CEOs to IT professionals and SAP experts and experience the latest in SAP’s transformative technologies. Get the tools you need to drive cloud transformation, optimize business processes, and stay ahead in today’s fast-paced landscape.

Registration: https://www.saphila2025.com/event/e7ac1636-637a-4aa2-bf29-ffcb7f8f0053/about-saphila

Manoj Patil

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest Winners Revealed

entry.title: Unable to enable KeyUserExtensibility on Dev Tenant
entry.content:
We would like to setup a communication setup to deploy custom extension UI5 application to Dev Tenant.


Please note we have 3-tier environment 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to enable KeyUserExtensibility on Dev Tenant
entry.content:
Hello Sidhartha Mudrakola,

For 3SL customer key user extensibility available only in customizing tenant, You can not enable the key user extensibility in development tenant

For more info, You can refer the below KBA

3342103 - Key User Extensibility apps are not available or read only - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - SAP for Me

 

You can not setup a communication setup to deploy custom extension UI5 application in Development Tenant.

For more information about creating a Custom UI, please follow the documentation under:

  • UI Development
  • Develop an SAP Fiori Application UI and Deploy it to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Using SAP Business Application Studio
  • Create a SAP Fiori App and Deploy it to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, ABAP Environment
  • Consuming Services in a UI

For more info, You can refer the below KBA

3399748 - You do not have start authorization for R3TR IWSV XXXXXXXXXX 0001, return code4 - Developer Extensibility - SAP S/4HANA Cloud - SAP for Me

 

Best Regards,

Pooja

entry.title: Re: MSME number in vendor Master
entry.content:
Did you already look for

  • OSS notes such as 3045574 - India: MSME Classification for Vendors 
  • SAP answers to customer influence for MSME

NB: Put a correct tag (related to India localization) to get better answers 🙂

entry.title: Implement Quick View in ABAP CDS
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I'm trying to implement a Quick View for a data reference as described in Fiori Feature Showcase example.

So, I created the CDS with UI.facet for QUICK_VIEW:

@Consumption.semanticObject: 'Practitioner'

define root view entity /RHP/I_Practitioner
  as select from /RHP/R_PractitionerTP

{

@UI.facet: [ { type: #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
                      label: 'Pracitioner'
                      targetQualifier: 'QuickViewCard',
                      purpose: #QUICK_VIEW } ]

@ObjectModel.text.element: [ 'FullName' ]
key PractitionerUUID,

@UI.fieldGroup [ { qualifier: 'QuickViewCard', position: 10 } ]
FullName,

@UI.fieldGroup: [ { qualifier: 'QuickViewCard', position: 40 } ]
_PractitionerRoleStandard.IsDoctor,

@UI.fieldGroup: [ { qualifier: 'QuickViewCard', position: 50 } ]
_PractitionerRoleStandard.IsNurse,

@UI.fieldGroup: [ { qualifier: 'QuickViewCard', position: 60 } ]
_PractitionerRoleStandard.IsPharmacist

}

In the projection view I created the association as foreign key

define view entity /RHP/C_PatientPractitionerTP
  as projection on /RHP/R_PatientPractitionerTP
  association of one to one /RHP/I_Practitioner as _Practitioner on $projection.PractitionerUUID = _Practitioner.PractitionerUUID
{

  key UUID,

      PatientUUID,

      @Consumption.semanticObject: 'Practitioner'

      @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [ { entity:            { name:    '/RHP/C_PractitionerVH',
                                                                 element: 'PractitionerUUID' },
                                            additionalBinding: [ { localConstant: 'X',
                                                                   element:       'IsDoctor',
                                                                   usage:         #FILTER } ] } ]
      @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_Practitioner'
      PractitionerUUID,

      CreatedBy,

      CreatedAt,

      LastChangedBy,

      LastChangedAt,

      EtagMaster,

      /* Associations */
      _Patient : redirected to parent /RHP/C_PatientTP,
      _Practitioner

}

In the application, the link is enabled but the quick view shows as "No details available"

Any clue of what I forgot?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Error code 440 in sap cpi?
entry.content:
Hi Swaminadh,

Can you provide more details regarding the error message? The error code number on its own is not enough information.

Regards,
Ian
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: API_PRODUCT_SRV not creating the Purchasing View
entry.content:
Hi @Thandi ,

The API you are using is correct, but the payload format does not match the schema. I have provided a sample schema below. Modify your schema (only plant data) and try uploading it again, this will create the purchasing view.

"to_Plant": {
"results": [
               {
                 "Plant": "XXXX",
                 "PurchasingGroup": "XXXX",
                 "ProfitCenter": "",
                 "ConsumptionTaxCtrlCode": "85011011"
              }
       ]
}

entry.title: Please provide samples reports for the monthly and yearly for With-holding Tax in S4 Public Cloud
Please provide sample for the monthly and quarterly reports for Late Payment interest and penalties
Change properties of Attachment Component on Create Maintenance Request [F1511A] via Adaptation
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I am trying to update the properties of the Attachment Reuse Component that is included on the standard Create Maintenance Request application. I want to update the flavor to "withCheckin" and remove the "Add a Link" action. I have created an adaptation project in BAS and I have tried the following: 

  • Creating an extension controller, attaching onto an event, getting the component, and attempting to change the properties. 
  • Adding a change to the manifest app variant.

Unfortunately, I have had no luck. I can technically update the properties of the component via the extension controller, but my changes are overridden once the component entirely loads in. If I could find a way to set the properties after the component is entirely loaded in then that would work. 

Another option is adding a change to the manifest app variant. I was able to successfully do this on "My Maintenance Requests" but that's much more straight forward since its a true Fiori elements application. 

Example of what I am trying to accomplish:

entry.title: Re: Error returning creation data in RAP managed with save unmanaged
entry.content: So, WAIT UP TO 10 SECONDS doesn't work better than WAIT UP TO 1 SECONDS. I just wanted to be sure that the asynchronous call ends before "SELECT message FROM zfh_t_log is" executed.

entry.title: How to write the formula in Bus rule where the notice PD is >6 months even for 6months and 1 day?
entry.content:
We have a requirement to put in place where the notice period duration for a country is 1 month if the employee tenure/duration in the company is more than 6 months, ie 6 months and 1 day also. If tenure is less than 6 months into the organization, then the notice period should be 1 week.
While using the predefined function "get the number of months between start and end dates", where my start date is hire date and end date is current date, then the function behaves like if the tenure in company is equal to 6 or <6 months then the notice period is picked up as defined ie. 1 week.

 

When the duration is more than 6 months, then the function will consider the 1 month notice period only if the month has passed. Ex: if tenure is 6 months and 5 days, then the function picks up the 1 week condition. If the tenure is 7 months (post 6 months), then it considers the current condition or 1 month condition. 

now my problem is, even if the tenure is 6 months and 2 days, the 1 month condition should be picked up and not 1 week. 

Request anyone to help me on this issue. Business people are surprised on listening to the way SF is calculating the number of months. We should have an option to input decimal value also in Business rule similar to number. Kindly help if anyone has been able to implement similar requirement.

Regards,

Nagavalli B n

entry.title: BP role creation Reconciliation acct : Is a required entry field".
entry.content: Hello all, I am facing an issue while trying to crate a BP Role under Supplier Fin Accounting. Even after entering the data in the Reconciliation acct, when I try to save, I am unable to save and it gives me an error "Reconciliation acct : Is a required entry field". Please help me how resolve the issue.

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Central Business Configuration 2502
entry.content:
With the latest release for SAP Central Business Configuration, exciting new features are available. This blog post will provide you with a comprehensive overview of these features.

Support of the Retail Industry

We’re thrilled to announce that SAP Central Business Configuration now supports the retail industry. In the Define Scope app, you can include retail-specific scope. Then, in the Set Up Organizational Structure app, you can create retail-specific organizational units. Finally, during the Product-Specific Configuration phase, you can adapt the retail-specific configuration settings. This allows you to leverage retail-specific business processes and tailor them to your requirements.

Retail-specific organizational units in the Set Up Organizational Structure app

Enhanced Clarity for Deployment and Activation

Next up, we have an update in the Deployment Target app. Here, we've separated the Deployment Status column into two separate columns for better clarity: Deployment Status and Activation Status. This change allows you to easily understand the current status of the deployment and the activation individually, enhancing transparency.

New columns in the Deployment Target app

For a quick summary, check out this video about What's New in 2502. Don’t forget to also use the What’s New Viewer on the SAP Help Portal, which provides further details and links about all the recent changes.

That wraps up the new features this time. Make sure to follow the SAP Central Business Configuration tag or follow this dedicated blog collection to stay up to date with the latest blog posts.

Do you have an idea on how to further enhance SAP Central Business Configuration? Go to the SAP Customer Influence portal to submit an improvement request or vote for the ideas of others. This helps us understand your requirements even better and prioritize our work accordingly. We’re looking forward to your improvement requests.

entry.title: Re: Determination of the newest = latest record for non-effective dated objects

Subbu

entry.title: Re: Testing of S/4HANA Financial Planning Data ODATA APIs via SAP API Hub
entry.content: When same parameters -  Planning Category, WBS Element, Fiscal Year Period, GL Account, Amount In Transaction Currency, Transaction Currency are passed to API for second time, then it overwrites the existing financial plan -  How to use the API so that it appends to existing financial data already in system?

entry.title: Re: SUBMIT rfitemgl problem
entry.content: As a solution, I did a select before doing the 'submit' and if I don't find it, I won't even do the 'submit'.

entry.title: Re: Application preview in VS Code vs Deploy to ABAP
entry.content: Hi - I checked the Metadata and even though I have provided annotation for foreignkey and created associations, the common value help is not there in the metadata. Why?

entry.title: Re: Duplicate plan order orders for same sales order line...
entry.content:
Hello

I don't think we can help you to find the root cause of the issue at this point. 

As I mentioned, the most common cause for the issue is the rescheduling check, but we cannot know for sure if this is the case just by looking into the orders already created.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Monitoring Service Key Expiration which are under BTP instance related to cloud foundry

entry.title: Re: Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Apps
entry.content: any help please

entry.title: Where to start as a total newcomer to SAP.
entry.content:
Hello everyone, first of all sorry if I'm posting this somewhere I shouldn't but I really need some guidance here.

Before creating missunderstandings I have to point out I've been through some rough years mentally and I'm just starting to be able to fight with it so I still struggle a bit with being consistent by myself.

That said, I've had a chat with a irl friend working on lindedln, basically told me that S4 Hana HCM is one of the most requested profiles that most enterprises look for, and there's almost no people that studied that so there's even less people that can teach from scratch.

I've been struggling because I can't seem to find a course (free or not idc) that actually teaches me how to work as a HCM SAP consultant, so I've seen tons of youtube videos, tutorials on how to manage positions, workers, pays, days off, role switches, etc etc. But I can't seem to find an official course that can teach me from 0 to "hired" to say it easily, I've seen even other ERP's, I'm a IT technician so I have kind of a base and slightly worked with Databases before, still, Idk whats my entry point, what points to follow and what to exactly study to become a SAP HCM consultant.

I mentioned my mental situtation first because i know there can be people that just decided to smack some youtube tutorials and had the will to learn by themselves in 2 months, but I've been struggling to even find a way to practice, and even worse, a way to prove that I'm capable in that ambit.

Long story short, could anyone please guide me on what to do, what to study, how to test myself and how to eventually make a living out of it? Needed prerequisites/courses/webpages/tutorials/specific things, everything is going to be well received by me!
Thank you truly,
Axel.

entry.content: Did you solve it? I have the same problem.

entry.title: Re: Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Apps. Try again.

entry.title: Re: Exploring the Potential of SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content: zero-copy data integration is great addition!! SAP Databricks on Azure will definitely rock.

entry.title: BW4HANA Open ODS view - master data
entry.content:
Hi all,

how does the Open ODS view for master data work? We are trying to use it as a time-dependet infoobject. But here is the problem. The valid period is set by time-stamp fields. When we asociate this Open ODS view with Open ODS view facts it shows empty values for the infoobject. As soon as we move the valid period fields from valid period folder to characteristics folder (aka attributes), data is showing. I tried to find something on the net, but there is not much info about it. I found only this:

  • Key date-based access to time-dependent master data is not supported in the Open ODS views

I dont understand this. How is it not supported? What is the point of having a valid period folder in the open ods view for master data? How does it work? Can anyone explain it? Maybe the time-stamp field is the problem? And we should change it to calday?

Best regards,

Martin Zluky

entry.title: GL transactional data mass reset/reverse for 1 company code
entry.content:
Hi SAP Support,

Our customer would like to re-migrate one of their companies  for both set of books - local & group. Is there any function that you can provide to mass reset/reverse the transactional data for all postings made to this specific company code?


Best regards,
PERSON_NAME 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: GL transactional data mass reset/reverse for 1 compan...
entry.content:
No, SAP Business ByDesign does not provide a standard function to mass reset or reverse all transactional data for a specific company code.

However, individual transactions can be reversed manually

entry.title: Re: Would i able to do stay certified assessment by purch...
entry.content: Dear Margit, Thank you for your assistance. I have a follow-up question regarding the Partner Learning Hub subscription our company is planning to purchase. Once we are connected to the designated learning bucket, will we have access to self-assessment tools and resources within the platform? Thank you for your clarification.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud: Unifying Enterprise Data for Next-Generation Insights
entry.content: Good to know! Datasphere will be there!

entry.title: AO connection to HANA direct ODBC connection
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues,

Is there an issue with this supported solution of SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office (AO) connection to HANA using direct ODBC (Type: Direct Connection) connection? AO export to excel and then if a reporting tool like Power BI is used I assume the note here is relevant 3255746 - Unpermitted usage of ODP Data Replication APIs - SAP for Me.?  

assumption:

  1. is this is not live data when the query is run to pull new data.  
  2. it is using 'The plug-in called SAP HANA EPM-MDS component (previously also known under the terms InformationAccess (InA) or MultiDimensional Services (MDS)))
  3. the way to go would be to have a solution with SAP Analytics Cloud Connection, and configuration of SAC with Live Data Connections and have AO pull real-time data through this connection. License would require to be converted from basic? to SAP Analytics Cloud for Business Intelligence (BI),

     

    • For more see SAP Note 2885389 Note 2885389 SAP Note 2294147. This would also require converting license from 'Basic SAP Analytics Cloud which is pre-requisite for AO' to 'sap analytics cloud for business intelligence, public system option'. 

We do not have BW system, and runtime DB license.

 Defining connections to SAP HANA | SAP Help Portal. 

Defining connections to SAP Analytics Cloud | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: 3537476 KRNL 753 PL 1436
entry.content:
Does SAP Kernel 753PL1436 addresses the vulnerabilities of SAP Note 3537476?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: 3537476 KRNL 753 PL 1436
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, SAP Kernel 753PL1436 will already contain the correction instructions of SAP Note 3537476.

For more details, please refer to SAP Note 3549556 - FAQ for Security Note 3537476 / Error Create failed during internal communication.

 

Best regards;

entry.title: Re: Map the database table data to Purchase Order JSON format
entry.content: Did you find out how to remove the square brackets?

entry.title: Work permit alert expiration rule issue
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I was trying to create a business rule to trigger an alert notification and send an email to inform HR that an employee’s Work Permit in Singapore will expire in 30 days and 60 days.

For this purpose, I created the following rule:

However, after reviewing the workflow and the alert message, HR only receives the alert when the Work Permit expiration date is two months before. The second condition for 30 days is being skipped.
In Manage Alerts & Notifications, the 30-day alert remains pending.

I tried a different approach, and my concern is whether this approach is correct, using a date plus condition in the "IF" clause:



With this second approach, HR receives both alerts for 30 days and 60 days, and the alert creation date and alert effective date remain the same (as of today, during testing).

Could you please provide your expertise and guidance?

Thank you!

entry.title: Request for Mass Upload of Journal Entries from Excel for Multiple Companies
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We need to know if there is a way to upload journal entries in bulk via an Excel file for multiple companies. Due to the nature of our business, we manually process many journal entries through files, and we currently have to prepare a separate template for each company (we manage over companies). We would need to be able to post journal entries for several companies at once using an Excel template.

Is there any way to achieve this?

Thank you very much for your assistance.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Request for Mass Upload of Journal Entries from Excel...
entry.content: Thank you for your inquiry. In SAP Business ByDesign, journal entries can be uploaded in bulk via Microsoft Excel templates, but currently, the standard system requires separate templates for each company. There is no standard functionality to post journal entries for multiple companies at once using a single Excel file.    Regards

entry.title: Re: Set up Outlook Integration for Interview Scheduling in Test instance and PRD instance
entry.content:
Hi Samatha,

Just wondering if you got any feedback or if you solve this escenario.

entry.title: Where can I find the results of the CALL CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY query in SAP HANA Database
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

After executing this query for consistency check:

CALL CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY ('CHECK', 'NULL', 'NULL');

Where can I find the result of the query? from where I can analyze it? does it create trace file?

In what format the output will generate for this?

Please let me know where can I find the result for this.

Thank you in Advance!

 

Best Regards,

Shruti

entry.title: Re: Enabling Microsoft Teams Online Meetings for SAP SuccessFactors Processes
entry.content: Hi Vania,
